args.toolAction: "Restoring Admin Dashboard page.tsx with User Management and mobile responsive layouts"

args.CommandLine: "node -e \"const fs = require('fs'); const lines = fs.readFileSync('C:/Users/uc/.gemini/antigravity/brain/45f2bc87-dd96-4058-98a8-841dcbede973/.system_generated/logs/transcript.jsonl', 'utf8').split('\\n'); let calls = []; for(const line of lines) { if(!line) continue; try { const d = JSON.parse(line); if(d.type==='PLANNER_RESPONSE' && d.tool_calls) { for(const call of d.tool_calls) { if(call.args && typeof call.args.TargetFile === 'string' && call.args.TargetFile.includes('admin/page.tsx')) { calls.push(call); } } } } catch(e){} } fs.writeFileSync('admin_calls.json', JSON.stringify(calls, null, 2)); console.log('Found ' + calls.length + ' calls');\""
